caption: The video features a man speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. He is dressed formally in a suit and tie, indicating a professional setting. The man appears to be addressing an audience or participating in an interview, as suggested by his direct gaze and the presence of a microphone near his ear. The background shows a modern interior with large windows, allowing natural light to fill the space. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay on the screen. The overall atmosphere suggests a tech-focused conference or seminar, where industry professionals gather to discuss advancements and innovations in database technology.
